```{r organelle_debris_table, eval=has_organelles && has_org_debris}
  gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>% cols_hide(c(depth_dist, depth_text))
}
gt_tbl
```

# 8. Contaminants

```{r contaminant_table_build, eval=has_contaminants}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Contaminant table
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
ct_has_depth <- "depth_mean" %in% names(contam_df) && !all(is.na(contam_df$depth_mean))
ct_df <- contam_df
if (ct_has_depth) ct_df <- ct_df %>% filter(!is.na(depth_mean))

if (nrow(ct_df) > 0) {
  ct_df <- ct_df %>%
    mutate(
      is_circular = str_detect(contig, "c$"),
      species_clean = str_replace_all(species, "_", " "),
      species_clean = if_else(!is.na(species_clean) & str_starts(species_clean, paste0(genus, " ")),
                              str_replace(species_clean, paste0("^", genus, " "), ""), species_clean),
      binomial = case_when(
        is.na(species_clean) | species_clean == "" | species_clean == genus | species_clean == "Unknown" ~
          paste0(genus, " sp."),
        TRUE ~ paste0(genus, " ", species_clean)),
      binomial = str_replace_all(binomial, "_", " "),
      abundance = if (ct_has_depth) depth_mean * length else length
    )

  ct_agg <- ct_df %>%
    group_by(binomial, kingdom, family) %>%
    summarise(
      n_contigs = n(), total_bp = sum(length), abundance = sum(abundance),
      depth_mean_agg = if (ct_has_depth) mean(depth_mean) else NA_real_,
      depth_min = if (ct_has_depth) min(depth_mean) else NA_real_,
      depth_max = if (ct_has_depth) max(depth_mean) else NA_real_,
      length_min = min(length), length_max = max(length),
      n_circular = sum(is_circular), mean_coverage = mean(coverage),
      .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(abundance)) %>% head(top_n_contam) %>%
    mutate(rank = row_number())

  if (nrow(ct_agg) > 0) {
    # Domain badges
    domain_info <- tibble(
      kingdom = c("Bacteria", "Archaea", "Viruses", "Animalia", "Plantae", "Fungi", "Chromista", "Protozoa"),
      domain_abbr = c("Bac", "Arc", "Vir", "Ani", "Pla", "Fun", "Chr", "Pro"),
      domain_color = c("#E41A1C", "#984EA3", "#4DAF4A", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#FF7F00", "#A65628", "#999999"))

    ct_agg <- ct_agg %>%
      left_join(domain_info, by = "kingdom") %>%
      mutate(domain_abbr = if_else(is.na(domain_abbr), "Unk", domain_abbr),
             domain_color = if_else(is.na(domain_color), "#999999", domain_color))

    # Family colors
    families <- unique(ct_agg$family); n_fam <- length(families)
    fam_colors <- if (n_fam <= 8) scales::brewer_pal(palette = "Set2")(max(n_fam, 3))[1:n_fam]
                  else if (n_fam <= 12) scales::brewer_pal(palette = "Set3")(max(n_fam, 3))[1:n_fam]
                  else scales::hue_pal()(n_fam)
    names(fam_colors) <- families

    ct_agg <- ct_agg %>%
      mutate(
        family_color = fam_colors[family],
        circ_indicator = case_when(n_circular == 0 ~ "\u25CB",
                                   n_circular == n_contigs ~ "\u25CF", TRUE ~ "\u25D0"),
        total_mb = total_bp / 1e6,
        total_pct = total_mb / max(total_mb) * 100,
        total_text = if_else(n_contigs == 1, sprintf("%.2f Mb", total_mb),
          sprintf("%.2f Mb (%.2f\u2013%.2f)", total_mb, length_min / 1e6, length_max / 1e6)))

    if (ct_has_depth) {
      max_depth <- max(ct_agg$depth_mean_agg)
      ct_agg <- ct_agg %>%
        mutate(depth_pct = depth_mean_agg / max_depth * 100,
               depth_text = if_else(n_contigs == 1, sprintf("%.0f\u00D7", depth_mean_agg),
                 sprintf("%.0f\u00D7 (%.0f\u2013%.0f)", depth_mean_agg, depth_min, depth_max)))
    }

    # Build gt table
    if (ct_has_depth) {
      tbl_data <- ct_agg %>% select(rank, domain_abbr, domain_color, family, family_color, binomial,
        n_contigs, total_text, total_pct, depth_text, depth_pct, mean_coverage, circ_indicator)
    } else {
      tbl_data <- ct_agg %>% select(rank, domain_abbr, domain_color, family, family_color, binomial,
        n_contigs, total_text, total_pct, mean_coverage, circ_indicator)
    }

    gt_tbl <- tbl_data %>% gt() %>%
      fmt_percent(columns = mean_coverage, decimals = 0) %>%
      text_transform(locations = cells_body(columns = domain_abbr), fn = function(x) {
        paste0("<span style='background-color:", tbl_data$domain_color,
               "; color: white; padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 10px;'>", x, "</span>")
      }) %>%
      text_transform(locations = cells_body(columns = family), fn = function(x) {
        paste0("<span style='border-left: 4px solid ", tbl_data$family_color, "; padding-left: 6px;'>", x, "</span>")
      }) %>%
      text_transform(locations = cells_body(columns = binomial), fn = function(x) {
        paste0("<em>", x, "</em>")
      }) %>%
      text_transform(locations = cells_body(columns = total_text), fn = function(x) {
        mapply(function(val, p) bar_cell(p, oi[7], val, alpha = 0.3),
               x, tbl_data$total_pct, SIMPLIFY = TRUE)
      }) %>%
      cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(rank, n_contigs, circ_indicator, mean_coverage)) %>%
      cols_align(align = "left", columns = total_text) %>%
      gt_theme() %>%
      tab_footnote(footnote = "\u25CF = all circularized, \u25D0 = mixed, \u25CB = all linear",
                   locations = cells_column_labels(columns = circ_indicator)) %>%
      tab_source_note(source_note = md(paste0("**Families:** ",
        paste(sapply(names(fam_colors), function(f) {
          paste0("<span style='border-left: 4px solid ", fam_colors[f],
                 "; padding-left: 4px; margin-right: 12px;'>", f, "</span>")
        }), collapse = " "))))

    if (ct_has_depth) {
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>%
        cols_label(rank = "", domain_abbr = "Domain", family = "Family", binomial = "Species",
                   n_contigs = "n", total_text = "Total Mb", depth_text = "Depth",
                   mean_coverage = "Cov%", circ_indicator = "Circ") %>%
        cols_hide(c(domain_color, family_color, total_pct, depth_pct)) %>%
        text_transform(locations = cells_body(columns = depth_text), fn = function(x) {
          mapply(function(val, p) bar_cell(p, oi[8], val, alpha = 0.3),
                 x, tbl_data$depth_pct, SIMPLIFY = TRUE)
        }) %>%
        cols_align(align = "left", columns = depth_text) %>%
        tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) %>%
        tab_header(title = md(paste0("**Top ", nrow(tbl_data), " Contaminants**")),
                   subtitle = md(paste0("Ranked by abundance (depth \u00D7 length) \u2014 ", params$plot_suffix)))
    } else {
      gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>%
        cols_label(rank = "", domain_abbr = "Domain", family = "Family", binomial = "Species",
                   n_contigs = "n", total_text = "Total Mb",
                   mean_coverage = "Cov%", circ_indicator = "Circ") %>%
        cols_hide(c(domain_color, family_color, total_pct)) %>%
        tab_options(table.width = pct(100)) %>%
        tab_header(title = md(paste0("**Top ", nrow(tbl_data), " Contaminants**")),
                   subtitle = md(paste0("Ranked by total length \u2014 ", params$plot_suffix)))
    }
    gt_tbl
  }
}
```

```{r no_contam_placeholder, eval=!has_contaminants, results='asis'}
cat('<div class="note-box">No contaminant sequences were detected. If contamination screening was not performed, provide a Centrifuger index with <code>--centrifuger-idx</code>.</div>')
```

# 9. Unclassified & Debris

```{r debris_table}
debris_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(classification %in% c("unclassified", "debris", "chrom_debris",
                                "chrom_unassigned")) %>%
  mutate(
    length_mb = length / 1e6,
    best_ref = if ("assigned_ref_id" %in% names(.)) assigned_ref_id else NA_character_,
    aligned_bp = if ("best_ref_union_bp" %in% names(.)) best_ref_union_bp else NA_integer_,
    reason = case_when(
      classification == "chrom_unassigned" ~ "Below synteny gates",
      classification == "chrom_debris" ~ "Duplicate of assembled chromosome",
      TRUE ~ classification
    )
  ) %>% arrange(desc(length_mb))

if (nrow(debris_df) > 0) {
  debris_df %>% head(50) %>%
    select(contig, original_name, length_mb, classification, best_ref, aligned_bp, reason) %>%
    gt() %>%
    cols_label(contig = "Contig", original_name = "Original Name", length_mb = "Length (Mb)", classification = "Category",
               best_ref = "Best Ref Hit", aligned_bp = "Aligned Bp", reason = "Reason") %>%
    fmt_number(columns = length_mb, decimals = 2) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = any_of("aligned_bp"), decimals = 0) %>%
    sub_missing(missing_text = "\u2014") %>%
    tab_header(title = md("**Unclassified & Debris**"),
               subtitle = md(paste0("Showing up to 50 of ", nrow(debris_df), " contigs"))) %>%
    gt_theme()
} else {
  htmltools::HTML('<div class="note-box">No unclassified or debris contigs.</div>')
}
```

---

<div style="font-size: 11px; color: #888; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; padding-top: 8px; margin-top: 24px;">
Generated by **dnadis** | `r params$synteny_mode` mode | `r Sys.time()` | `r params$plot_suffix`
</div>
